note: Creator-versioned world-agent roster. world-agent is the sole world sovereign: it owns the functional sub-agents below and closes every turn. The cast under souls/ are full M16 soul bundles bound by playthrough.json. Runtime may fan out to active souls concurrently, but world truth still closes through world-agent. No standalone narrator — world-agent integrates and narrates; story-narrative is only a drift fallback.

agents.name: World Agent
agents.description: Layer-1 主控调度器/team-leader:管理 soul 团队(并行+sticky)、按 scope 串行路由 functional 子代理、合并、推进循环/勾玉/消失/禁忌、直接产出叙事。

agents.name: Town Agent
agents.description: 潮待ち茶屋/城镇:导航、场所、NPC 互动、信息线索。

agents.name: Combat Agent
agents.description: 危机/冲突裁定:悠人苏醒反射攻击、险情、肢体冲突分级。

agents.name: Rules Referee
agents.description: 非战斗判定/常识检查/不可逆禁忌判定。

agents.name: World Builder
agents.description: 岛屿地图/区域 discovered/danger/连接/退潮可达性。

agents.name: NPC Builder
agents.description: 无名路人 NPC 生成(具名 cast 由 soul 自治)。

agents.name: Story Narrative
agents.description: 玩家进入未创作内容时的兜底第二人称薄描。

soul_team.note: Named cast = isolated soul actors bound by .neonrp/playthrough.json souls[]/active_souls. Each soul is authored as an internal six-specialist contract, but current runtime resolves it as one consolidated soul-agent. world-agent never reads souls/** — souls return results to it.

every_turn.description: world-agent owns the turn; active souls react in parallel; functional sub-agents are routed as needed; world-agent integrates and closes the player-facing narration.
